message:
feat(core): add dancing_links.rs — Knuth's DLX exact cover solver (ft-283h4.45)

Arena-allocated Dancing Links with cover/uncover operations, MRV column
selection heuristic, solve/solve_all/solve_limited, and from_matrix builder.
13 inline + 9 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
